summary.goal: Add guidance to CLAUDE.md for identifying the right parent node before branching
decisions: Added step 1 to the dev workflow with three concrete lookup commands: memex graph view (for the DAG shape), memex node list (for ID/status/goal scanning), and memex search <keyword> (for full-text discovery)
Kept the guidance inline with the numbered workflow rather than a separate section, so it reads as a prerequisite step rather than reference material
Included two heuristics: default to the current active node [*] for genuinely new work; prefer the most specific ancestor over the root when extending prior work
